untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (twin peaks, valley floor, uptrend confirmation) requires candlestick/swing analysis beyond available indicators. The signal requires identifying: (1) preceding uptrend, (2) twin peak formation with specific geometry, and (3) valley floor level—none of which can be expressed using only price, moving averages, oscillators, and volatility indicators. Pivot point used as proxy for confirmation level, but true double-top pattern detection is untranslatable.
translation_notes: This is a pattern-recognition signal that requires multi-bar analysis and peak/trough detection. The available indicators cannot reliably identify twin peaks or valley formations. To properly implement this signal, you would need: (1) a peak/trough detection algorithm, (2) swing point identification, or (3) custom pattern-matching logic. The pivot point substitution is a weak approximation only.
